title: TerraFirmaCraft Odyssey: TFC+
description: This is a lightweight pack based on the unoffical TerraFirmaCraft Modpack and the mods' many addons
body:
This is a pack based on the unoffical TerraFirmaCraft Modpack.

With the use of Embeddium, it is tailored to low-end and high-end computers alike, although Weather2 is still quite resource intesntive, so if you are running a low-end machine consider disabling the mod

An incredibly beautiful and intergrative Minecraft experience, tailored for you.

Performance mods are retained and some mods are excluded to remove incompatibilities and bloat

Additions:
- [Firmalife](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/firmalife): advanced foodmaking, cooking, brewing, using TFC Mechanics.
- [Weather2](https://www.google.com/search?q=Weather2&oq=Weather2&gs_lcrp=EgZjaHJvbWUyDggAEEUYJxg5GIAEGIoFMg8IARAjGCcYnQIYgAQYigUyBggCEEUYQDINCAMQABiDARixAxiABDIWCAQQLhiDARjHARixAxjJAxjRAxiABDIQCAUQABiDARiSAxixAxiABDINCAYQABiSAxiABBiKBTINCAcQABiDARixAxiABNIBBzkyNWowajmoAgCwAgE&sourceid=chrome&ie=UTF-8): A fully fledged weather system along with realistic storms and tornadoes in the world of TFC.
- [Ars Nouveau](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ars-nouveau): create and cast magic spells in the world of TerraFirmaCraft, just find a sourceberry bush (Mountain biome, on gravel or grass).
- Immersive Aircraft: [Terrafly](https://modrinth.com/mod/terrafly) mod bridges the two mods together
- Immersive Engineering + addons with the help of [TFC + IE Crossover](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/tfc-ie-crossover) by 
Nmagpie
- Preview your world before generation!
- [Enchanting in TFC](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/enchanting-with-tfc): craft an enchanting table with wrought iron sheets, red wool, and enchant!
Farmer's Delight, Water  flasks, and other addons for the ultimate TerraFirmaCraft experience :)
- Many more additions and add-ons, check the modlist!

[Faithful 32x](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/faithful-32x/files/5505946)

[Faithful 32x Modded](https://github.com/Faithful-Resource-Pack/Faithful-32x-Mods/tree/1.20.x)

[Faithful 32x - Immersive Aircraft](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/faithful-32x-immersive-aircraft/files/all?page=1&pageSize=20) resources packs all recommended for the best experience.

NOTE: If any players are having problems with the rain lagging up their game go to Weather2 config and change Particle_vanilla_precipitation in the Particles.toml to true
